evidence.text: Prompt evaluation framework for NaniDAO models # NaniDAO/evals A Python library for generating completions and evaluating NaniDAO models using different datasets, prompts, and configuration files. ## Quick Start 1. Set up environment variables in `.env`: ```bash NANI_API_KEY=your_nani_api_key NANI_BASE_URL=http://nani.ooo/api/chat GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_anthropic_api_key OPENAI_API_KEY=your_openai_api_key ``` If not, you can specify individual API_KEY/BASE_URL using CLI arguments. 2. Install dependencies: ```bash # Using uv (recommended) git clone
